context: Tests whether the agent correctly sets up the WooCommerce client, creates orders with the right default fields (status, payment_method, set_paid), properly includes variation_id in line_items for variable products, and separates order note creation from order status updates using the correct endpoint.

checklist.name: Credentials via env vars
checklist.description: WooCommerceRestApi is initialized with process.env references for URL, consumer key, and consumer secret — no hardcoded strings

checklist.name: Axios timeout configured
checklist.description: The client is initialized with axiosConfig: { timeout: 15000 } or a numeric timeout value

checklist.name: Order default status pending
checklist.description: New orders are created with status: "pending" (not "processing" or omitted)

checklist.name: Default payment method stripe
checklist.description: createOrder sets payment_method to "stripe" when no payment method is specified

checklist.name: variation_id in line_items
checklist.description: The example order or createOrder interface includes variation_id as a field in line_items and the example-usage passes variation_id 312 for the variable product

checklist.name: Order note via separate POST
checklist.description: When a note is provided to updateOrderStatus, it is posted to orders/{id}/notes endpoint separately (not merged into the PUT status update body)

checklist.name: Error code handling
checklist.description: Code references response.data.code or catches WooCommerce-specific error codes (rest_invalid_param, woocommerce_rest_cannot_create, or similar) in error handling

checklist.name: Order listing default status
checklist.description: getOrders defaults to fetching orders with status: "processing" when no status is specified
